name: NayePankh Foundation
tagline: It's that easy to bring a Smile on Their Faces
description: NayePankh Foundation is a non-governmental organisation with a strong desire to help the society and make it a better place for all. We are one of the biggest student-led NGOs of India with operations extended across Kanpur, Ghaziabad, and various other cities.
mission: Service to mankind is the service to god. We aim to uplift underprivileged communities by providing free food, sanitary pads, clothes, and education.
vision: Think global, Act local. To revolutionise society together by doing everything in our power to make the world a better place.

founder.name: Prashant Shukla
founder.title: Founder & President
founder.quote: If we all do something, then together there is no problem that we cannot solve!

initiatives.title: Education
initiatives.description: Providing free education and learning resources to underprivileged children across India. We organize tuition classes, distribute school supplies, and support students through mentorship programs.
activities: Free tuition classes for underprivileged children

initiatives.title: Health Awareness
initiatives.description: Conducting health awareness campaigns, free medical check-up camps, and distributing sanitary pads to promote hygiene and well-being in underserved communities.

initiatives.title: Women Empowerment
initiatives.description: Empowering women through skill development, self-defense training, menstrual hygiene awareness, and creating opportunities for financial independence.

initiatives.title: Food Distribution
initiatives.description: Distributing free food to the hungry and homeless. We organize regular food drives and community kitchens to ensure no one goes to bed hungry.
activities: Daily food distribution to the homeless

initiatives.title: Environmental Campaigns
initiatives.description: Organizing tree plantation drives, cleanliness campaigns, and environmental awareness programs to protect our planet for future generations.

volunteer_roles.description: Teach underprivileged children in community classes
Plan and organize community events and campaigns
Create content and manage NGO social media presence
Participate in food drives, health camps, and plantation drives
Help raise funds through campaigns and donor outreach
Support website, app development, and digital literacy programs

tax_info: Your donations are tax exempted under 80G of the Indian Income Tax Act
